modules.description: SLA monitoring engine that evaluates latency metrics against predefined SLA thresholds / 根据预设SLA阈值评估延迟指标的监控引擎

inputs.tpot_limit: float / TPOT阈值（Token生成延迟上限）

methods.name: check
methods.description: Return SLA state: SAFE, WARNING, or VIOLATED / 返回SLA状态：安全、警告或违反

modules.description: Adaptive load controller that adjusts concurrency based on SLA state / 根据SLA状态动态调整并发数的负载控制器

methods.name: adjust
methods.description: Return the new concurrency level / 返回调整后的并发数

modules.module: metrics.latency_tracker / 指标层.延迟记录器
modules.description: Collects latency metrics during benchmark execution / 在Benchmark运行过程中收集延迟指标

methods.name: record
methods.description: Record latency metrics for a request / 记录一次请求的延迟指标

modules.description: Maintains a time-based sliding window of metric values / 维护基于时间的指标滑动窗口

methods.name: values
methods.outputs: List[float] / 窗口内的指标值列表

modules.module: scheduler.thread_manager / 调度层.线程管理器
modules.description: Thread pool manager that wraps ThreadPoolExecutor / 对ThreadPoolExecutor的封装，用于管理线程池

modules.module: scheduler.conversation_scheduler / 调度层.对话调度器
modules.description: Schedules user conversations and dispatches prompts to worker threads / 调度用户对话并将请求分发到线程池

methods.name: run_user
methods.description: Execute prompts for one user session / 执行一个用户的完整对话流程

modules.description: Generates prompts by sampling from prompt templates / 从模板库中随机采样生成Prompt
Simulates a user conversation session / 模拟真实用户的对话会话

methods.name: has_next
methods.outputs: bool / 是否还有下一轮对话

modules.module: workload.workload_builder / 负载层.负载构建器
modules.description: Builds simulated user workloads / 构建模拟用户负载

modules.module: utils.config_loader / 工具模块.配置读取
modules.description: Load YAML configuration files / 加载YAML配置文件

modules.module: utils.logger / 工具模块.日志系统
modules.description: Global logging utility used across the benchmark system / 全局日志工具，用于记录Benchmark运行信息

main_flow.description: Benchmark execution pipeline / Benchmark执行流程
steps: Load prompt templates / 读取Prompt模板
Generate users using WorkloadBuilder / 使用WorkloadBuilder生成用户
Each user produces prompts / 每个用户生成多轮Prompt
Simulated inference generates TTFT and TPOT / 模拟推理生成TTFT和TPOT
LatencyTracker records metrics / LatencyTracker记录延迟指标
SLAEngine evaluates SLA compliance / SLAEngine评估SLA是否满足
LoadStrategy adjusts concurrency / LoadStrategy调整并发数
Repeat for multiple iterations / 多轮迭代执行Benchmark
Output final benchmark result / 输出最终Benchmark结果
